allow: Bash(python -c "import app; print\('OK - rotas:', [r.rule for r in app.app.url_map.iter_rules\(\) if 'critical' in r.rule]\)")
Bash(python -c "import app; rules = [\(r.rule, r.endpoint\) for r in app.app.url_map.iter_rules\(\)]; [print\(r\) for r in sorted\(rules\)]")
Bash(python -c "import subprocess; result = subprocess.run\(['python', '-c', 'from static import style'], capture_output=True\); print\(len\(open\('static/style.css'\).readlines\(\)\), 'lines'\)")
